title: Default Item Name from form submission

posts.author: Sam_T (Sam Tomkins)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m currently in the process of creating multiple forms for my business.

Is there a way to change the default item name from a form submission?

Currently it appears as “Incoming form answer”. (Changing the board terminology didn’t resolve this issue and I don’t want them to have to type an item name in every time they submit a form.

Any and all help will be very much appreciated

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Sam!

If you select the option to include name question in form this will allow form submitters to submit their name which will default to the item name:

Screen Shot 2023-09-13 at 2.59.51 pm2502×1048 207 KB

Does this help?

posts.author: JaredJLY (Jared Young)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I have the form name auto populated as the item name everytime?

posts.author: kevin.byrd (Kevin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would also like to set a default value in that field so that users don’t have to fill in a field that they would like to order supplies.
It’s a pretty basic request to be able to name our own forms so that our boards aren’t filled with similar named items that could be distinctly different.
